response.step_by_step_log: I identified the three songs through on-screen text in the video: '大きな愛でもてなして' (Song 1), '妄想アスパルテーム' (Song 2), and '絶対アイドル辞めないで' (Song 3). I searched for their lyrics and translations using the templates '[Song Title] [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics'. I found the lyrics for '大きな愛でもてなして' (original artist °C-ute), '妄想アスパルテーム' (original artist picco), and '絶対アイドル辞めないで' (original artist =LOVE). All songs were performed by Kazerui Iroha.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley of popular J-Pop/Vocaloid songs performed by Kazerui Iroha (accompanied by other virtual idols), including '大きな愛でもてなして' by °C-ute, '妄想アスパルテーム' by picco, and '絶対アイドル辞めないで' by =LOVE.

scenes.description: Kazerui Iroha starts the medley with '大きな愛でもてなして'.
scenes.song_title: 大きな愛でもてなして
